name: Cloudflare R2
description: Cloudflare R2 is S3-compatible object storage with zero egress fees. Manage buckets, CORS, custom domains, lifecycle rules, event notifications, and temporary credentials through the Cloudflare API.

capabilities.name: buckets_list
capabilities.description: List all R2 buckets in an account.

capabilities.name: buckets_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a specific R2 bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new R2 bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_update
capabilities.description: Update properties of an R2 bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an R2 bucket.

capabilities.name: cors_get
capabilities.description: Get the CORS policy for a bucket.

capabilities.name: cors_put
capabilities.description: Set CORS rules for a bucket.

capabilities.name: cors_delete
capabilities.description: Remove CORS configuration from a bucket.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_list
capabilities.description: List custom domains for a bucket.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a custom domain.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_create
capabilities.description: Register a custom domain for a bucket.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_update
capabilities.description: Update custom domain configuration.

capabilities.name: custom_domains_delete
capabilities.description: Remove a custom domain from a bucket.

capabilities.name: managed_domain_get
capabilities.description: Get state of r2.dev public access for a bucket.

capabilities.name: managed_domain_update
capabilities.description: Configure r2.dev domain access for a bucket.

capabilities.name: event_notifications_list
capabilities.description: List event notification rules for a bucket.

capabilities.name: event_notifications_get
capabilities.description: Get a specific event notification rule.

capabilities.name: event_notifications_create
capabilities.description: Create event notification rules for a bucket.

capabilities.name: event_notifications_delete
capabilities.description: Delete event notification rules.

capabilities.name: lifecycle_get
capabilities.description: Get object lifecycle rules for a bucket.

capabilities.name: lifecycle_put
capabilities.description: Set object lifecycle rules for a bucket.

capabilities.name: lock_get
capabilities.description: Get lock rules for a bucket.

capabilities.name: lock_put
capabilities.description: Set lock policies for a bucket.

capabilities.name: metrics_get
capabilities.description: Get storage metrics across all buckets.

capabilities.name: sippy_get
capabilities.description: Get Sippy migration configuration for a bucket.

capabilities.name: sippy_put
capabilities.description: Configure Sippy migration for a bucket.

capabilities.name: sippy_delete
capabilities.description: Disable Sippy migration for a bucket.

capabilities.name: temp_credentials_create
capabilities.description: Create temporary access credentials for a bucket.
